project_title: Master Bundle Atlas - 152 source and handoff packets
final_object_type: source packet governance and project-routing system
runtime_target: packet registry with extraction, authority, route, duplicate-risk, and promotion-decision fields
operational_end_state: A large archive can be converted into governed build inputs by assigning each packet identity, source state, authority, project route, and next action.
minimum_operational_release: A promotion-ready source packet for Master Bundle Packet Promotion Atlas: inventory, authority classification, routing rule, claim ceiling, and reconciliation report.
full_build_definition: A source or packet system with inventory, provenance, authority status, routing logic, claim ceiling, promotion rule, and reconciliation tests.
source_actions_before_claim: Carry 7 source-application role(s) into the first build release and convert the most load-bearing source into a close-read contract before any quotation, page-specific citation, or strong literature-positioning claim.
claim_boundary: This is a full-build plan, not a claim that the full operational system has already been completed.
public_claim_now: May claim a full-build candidate exists with proof and source contracts; do not claim deployment, outside validation, or production readiness until live execution and passage verification are recorded.
current_status: source-backed proof build; needs source-to-output capture and close-read strengthening
blocking_gates: live capture and outside-use evidence before deployment or validation claims
first_full_build: Run one packet through canonical/derivative/archive/build-now classification and capture the next action.
launch_or_review_path: Open the source packet contract for `master-bundle-atlas`, reconcile source inventory, and render the promotion decision.

runtime_target: local-first web application or desktop module with persistent project state
operational_end_state: A researcher can enter a project, use named instruments, observe state changes, and export a governed work product.
minimum_operational_release: A runnable slice of Prism Foundry: one complete workflow from input to output, with fixture, state record, export, acceptance test, and source-bound claim boundary.
full_build_definition: A runnable local or web application with a defined user flow, input fixture, persisted or exportable output, source-bound mechanism, acceptance tests, and a reviewer-visible claim ceiling.
source_actions_before_claim: Complete 1 close-read contract(s), update 3 linked proof-capsule field(s), and preserve the current claim ceiling until passage notes exist.
claim_boundary: This is a full-build plan, not a claim that the full operational system has already been completed.
public_claim_now: May claim a prototype-to-full-build path exists; do not claim completed operational system.
current_status: source-backed proof build; needs source-to-output capture and close-read strengthening
blocking_gates: passage-level close-read notes | captured runnable workflow
first_full_build: Add promotion-router examples showing how a packet becomes a room, paper, software instrument, source reservoir, archive item, or blocked record.
launch_or_review_path: Create or open the local runtime slice for `mb-murano-os-prism-foundry-handoff`, then execute the fixture-to-output workflow and capture the result.

instruments.purpose: Turn the `state model` module into a concrete input-operation-output step for Prism Foundry.
instruments.input_contract: Project fixture, source duty, current claim boundary, and required output state.
instruments.operation: Execute or inspect the state model step against the project fixture and record the state change it is supposed to produce.
instruments.output_contract: A reviewer-visible state record, output artifact, or decision boundary tied to the project acceptance tests.
instruments.acceptance_condition: The state model instrument is present, named, connected to the fixture, and has an output or decision field that can be reviewed.

instruments.purpose: Turn the `instrument action` module into a concrete input-operation-output step for Prism Foundry.
instruments.input_contract: Project fixture, source duty, current claim boundary, and required output state.
instruments.operation: Execute or inspect the instrument action step against the project fixture and record the state change it is supposed to produce.
instruments.output_contract: A reviewer-visible state record, output artifact, or decision boundary tied to the project acceptance tests.
instruments.acceptance_condition: The instrument action instrument is present, named, connected to the fixture, and has an output or decision field that can be reviewed.
